mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PATCHNOTE_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PATCHNOTE ( PATCHNOTE_NO, GAME_CODE, TITLE, POST_DATE, PATCHNOTE_CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{patchnoteNo}, #{gameCode}, #{title}, DEFAULT, #{patchnoteContent} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TITLE, POST_DATE FROM NOTICE ORDER BY NOTICE_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 3
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TITLE, POST_DATE FROM PATCHNOTE ORDER BY PATCHNOTE_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 3

SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_ID as userId, USER_NAME as userName, EMAIL as email, WITHDRAW as withdraw, ENROLL_DATE as enrollDate FROM LOG_GG_USER
AND (USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR EMAIL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND WITHDRAW = #{withdraw}
ORDER BY USER_NAME ASC
ORDER BY ENROLL_DATE DESC

SELECT MAX(RP.REPORT_NO) as reportNo, RP.USER_NO as userNo, RP.BOARD_NO as boardNo, RP.REPLY_NO as replyNo, MAX(RP.REPORT_COUNT) as reportCount, MAX(RP.REPORT_CONTENT) as reportContent, MAX(RP.REPORT_TYPE) as reportType, MAX(RP.DONE_DATE) as doneDate,
B.BOARD_TITLE as title
RE.REPLY_CONTENT as title
FROM REPORT RP
JOIN BOARD B ON (RP.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) WHERE RP.STATUS = 'N' GROUP BY RP.BOARD_NO, RP.REPLY_NO, RP.USER_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE
JOIN REPLY RE ON (RP.REPLY_NO = RE.REPLY_NO) WHERE RP.STATUS = 'N' GROUP BY RP.REPLY_NO, RP.BOARD_NO, RP.USER_NO, RE.REPLY_CONTENT
ORDER BY reportCount DESC
ORDER BY reportNo DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRY SET ANSWER = #{answer}, ANSWER_STATUS = 'C' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT BOARD_NO, REPLY_NO FROM REPORT WHERE STATUS = 'N'
AND REPORT_TYPE = '댓글' AND REPORT_TYPE = '글'
AND GAME_CODE = #{game}
GROUP BY BOARD_NO, REPLY_NO, REPORT_TYPE )
mapper.update: UPDATE REPORT SET DONE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND DONE_DATE IS NULL
UPDATE REPORT SET DONE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REPLY_NO = #{replyNo} AND DONE_DATE IS NULL
